title: Network On-Premises Served License
text: Network On-Premises Served License A network on-premise served license is a local license file (or license code) that enables a Sentinel RMS License Manager (also called an RMS Server) to run concurrent licenses. Applications connect to the RMS License Manager over the network. No internet connection is required. For more information about the license server, see Sentinel RMS License Manager . To configure a network on-premises served license, see Configuring Network On-Premises Served Licenses . To return a network on-premises served license, see Returning Network On-Premises Served Licenses . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
